core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Swiss grid rigor meets modern enterprise density. No 'Vercel-look' soft shadows.
Emotion First: The UI must evoke absolute authority, security, and precision for government auditors.
Negative Space: Use macro negative space to separate distinct functional modules, but tight micro-spacing within data tables.
Color as Function: 95% monochrome. Color strictly indicates state (red flags, warnings, success) and primary actions.

typography.strategy: The 'Swiss Brutalist' approach. Radical weight contrast. Highly legible numbers for financial data.

surface_styles.dashboard_cards: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] rounded-none shadow-none hover:border-[#A3A3A3] transition-colors duration-200
surface_styles.header: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E5E5E5] sticky top-0 z-50

buttons.primary: bg-[#1D3557] text-white hover:bg-[#132338] font-medium px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-none
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#E5E5E5] hover:border-[#0A0A0A] font-medium px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-none
buttons.destructive: bg-[#E63946] text-white hover:bg-[#B32A36] font-medium px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors rounded-none

badges.critical: bg-[#E63946]/10 text-[#E63946] border border-[#E63946]/20 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono font-medium uppercase tracking-wider
badges.high: bg-[#F4A261]/10 text-[#D97706] border border-[#F4A261]/20 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono font-medium uppercase tracking-wider
badges.medium: bg-[#2A9D8F]/10 text-[#2A9D8F] border border-[#2A9D8F]/20 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono font-medium uppercase tracking-wider
badges.low: bg-[#E5E5E5] text-[#525252] border border-[#A3A3A3]/20 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono font-medium uppercase tracking-wider

components.inputs: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] focus:border-[#1D3557] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#1D3557] rounded-none px-4 py-2 transition-all w-full
components.library: Shadcn UI (heavily customized: remove border-radius completely, use hard 1px borders, replace Inter with IBM Plex Sans for body text)

motion.philosophy: Minimalist. Motion is strictly functional for feedback, not decorative.
motion.hover: Fast opacity or border color transition (150ms ease).
motion.page_transitions: None or extremely subtle fade-in (200ms ease-out).

icons.style: Regular or Light weight, providing crisp highly readable outlines fitting a data-heavy context.

auth_background.description: Modern glass skyscraper with reflective cloudy sky, used as an abstract trust-building background on the login page with a heavy white/light-grey scrim overlay.
auth_background.usage: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md overlay on top of this image

empty_state.description: Sunlight streams across an empty conference table, used for empty states where no rules are flagged.
empty_state.usage: Grayscale with low opacity as an empty state illustration.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' archetype (Archetype 4). Do not introduce soft UI, heavy drop shadows, or large border radii. Everything should feel crisp, authoritative, and data-first.
Configure tailwind.config.js to extend the font family mapping: 'heading' to Cabinet Grotesk, 'sans' to IBM Plex Sans, and 'mono' to IBM Plex Mono.
Use Phosphor icons. Make sure to run 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react'.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the dashboard. Use explicit col-span logic. Data panels must stretch to fill vertical space identically to their neighbors.
Do not use generic 'card' wrappers with soft shadows. Use hard 1px borders (`border-[#E5E5E5]`) with flat white backgrounds (`bg-white`) and `rounded-none`.
The hero image on the auth screen MUST have a strong overlay (e.g., `bg-white/80` or `bg-[#FAFAFA]/90` with `backdrop-blur-sm`) so the login form is perfectly legible.
Ensure all severity badges match the explicit hex codes defined in the colors section to ensure rapid scanning by auditors.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) for testing.
For Shadcn components, override default Vercel-like styles: remove border radius (rounded-md -> rounded-none), remove box-shadows, and use the strict border colors defined.
CRITICAL: Include the provided font imports in index.css so Cabinet Grotesk and IBM fonts are loaded.
